name: Memorize V
short_description: This is a game in the genre of paired images for memory.
detailed_description: Click on the closed icon to open the hidden image, and then open another to find the same image. And so on until you open all the pairs on the board. With each subsequent board, the number of hidden pictures increases, and so the game becomes harder. Good luck.
about_the_game: Click on the closed icon to open the hidden image, and then open another to find the same image. And so on until you open all the pairs on the board. With each subsequent board, the number of hidden pictures increases, and so the game becomes harder. Good luck.
